theme.en: The AI Memory Wall Goes Systemwide

dek.en: AI demand is no longer just lifting accelerator orders. It is pulling DRAM away from other industries, forcing export-control scrutiny, reshaping fab computing, and giving inference challengers a sharper opening.
dek.zh: AI需求不再只是推高加速器订单。它正在挤压其他行业的DRAM供给，引发出口管制审查，重塑晶圆厂计算基础设施，也给推理挑战者留下更明确的切入口。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Trade groups warn AI data centers are squeezing memory supply for other industries
title.zh: 行业组织警告AI数据中心正在挤压其他行业存储供应

summary.en: A coalition of nine U.S. trade associations urged the Trump administration to address an AI-driven memory shortage, warning that DRAM supply and pricing could spill into consumer electronics, autos, medical devices, broadband and other sectors through at least 2027. The story matters because the AI memory bottleneck is leaving the data-center lane and becoming a broader industrial-allocation problem. If policymakers respond, memory procurement could start to look more like a strategic supply-chain issue than a normal component cycle.
summary.zh: 由九个美国行业协会组成的联盟敦促特朗普政府应对AI驱动的存储短缺，并警告DRAM供应和价格压力至少到2027年都可能波及消费电子、汽车、医疗设备和宽带等行业。这条新闻重要，因为AI存储瓶颈已经离开数据中心单一赛道，变成更广泛的产业分配问题。如果政策层面介入，存储采购会越来越像战略供应链问题，而不是普通零部件周期。

title.en: Micron receives Nvidia memory-chip approval
title.zh: 美光获得Nvidia存储芯片认证

summary.en: Barron's reports that Micron received memory-chip approval from Nvidia, even as the stock reaction was mixed. Qualification is the key signal: Nvidia's AI platform demand is large enough that any validated memory supplier can gain strategic relevance quickly. For buyers, more qualified supply helps, but it does not erase the broader DRAM and HBM capacity tension showing up across the market.
summary.zh: Barron's报道称，美光获得Nvidia存储芯片认证，尽管股价反应并不单向。真正的信号是认证本身：Nvidia AI平台需求足够大，任何通过验证的存储供应商都可能迅速获得战略地位。对买方而言，更多合格供应有帮助，但并不能消除整个DRAM和HBM市场的产能紧张。

title.en: Jensen Huang says all three Korean HBM suppliers passed Nvidia qualification
title.zh: 黄仁勋称三家韩国HBM供应商均通过Nvidia认证

summary.en: The Elec reports that Jensen Huang said all three Korean HBM suppliers have passed Nvidia qualification. That broadens the approved supplier base, but it also shows how much leverage Nvidia has over the memory roadmap: supplier qualification effectively decides who can participate in the next AI buildout. The market still has to watch volume, yield, stack mix and package availability, not just qualification status.
summary.zh: The Elec报道称，黄仁勋表示三家韩国HBM供应商都已通过Nvidia认证。这扩大了合格供应商基础，也显示Nvidia对存储路线图拥有多强的话语权：供应商认证实际上决定谁能参与下一轮AI建设。市场仍需关注出货量、良率、堆叠组合和封装可得性，而不只是认证状态。

title.en: Kioxia argues SSDs are the answer when HBM is too expensive and DRAM cannot scale
title.zh: Kioxia称在HBM太贵、DRAM难扩时SSD可承接agentic AI

summary.en: DigiTimes reports that Kioxia used Computex to argue SSDs can help serve agentic AI workloads when HBM is too expensive and DRAM cannot scale. The claim is partly vendor positioning, but the workload point is real: long-context and agentic systems are pushing storage, memory and cache hierarchies into one optimization problem. NAND vendors are trying to move from capacity suppliers to active participants in AI inference architecture.
summary.zh: DigiTimes报道称，Kioxia在Computex表示，当HBM过于昂贵且DRAM难以扩展时，SSD可帮助支撑agentic AI工作负载。这个说法带有供应商立场，但工作负载问题是真实的：长上下文和智能体系统正在把存储、内存和缓存层级推成一个整体优化问题。NAND厂商正在试图从容量供应商变成AI推理架构的主动参与者。

title.en: CXMT hiring in South Korea puts Samsung and SK hynix on alert
title.zh: 长鑫在韩国招聘引发Samsung与SK hynix警惕

summary.en: DigiTimes says CXMT's hiring spree in South Korea is putting Samsung and SK hynix's memory lead on alert. Talent movement is a quiet but material part of the memory race, especially when China is trying to close technology gaps under export-control pressure. The story is less about one recruiting push and more about how DRAM capability is becoming a national supply-chain contest.
summary.zh: DigiTimes称，长鑫在韩国的招聘动作让Samsung和SK hynix对其存储领先地位保持警惕。人才流动是存储竞争中低调但关键的一环，尤其是在中国试图在出口管制压力下缩小技术差距时。这条新闻不只是一次招聘，而是说明DRAM能力正在成为国家级供应链竞争。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘

title.en: Warren invites Jensen Huang to testify on Nvidia's China AI-chip sales
title.zh: Warren邀请黄仁勋就Nvidia对华AI芯片销售作证

summary.en: CNBC reports that Senator Elizabeth Warren invited Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to a Senate hearing focused on China AI-chip sales. The political context is clear: lawmakers are moving from abstract export-control rules to direct scrutiny of company sales channels and compliance choices. For Nvidia, China exposure now carries policy risk alongside revenue upside.
summary.zh: CNBC报道称，美国参议员Elizabeth Warren邀请Nvidia CEO黄仁勋出席聚焦中国AI芯片销售的参议院听证会。政治背景很清楚：立法者正在从抽象出口管制规则转向直接审查公司销售渠道和合规选择。对Nvidia而言，中国业务现在既有收入吸引力，也有政策风险。

title.en: US closes loophole for Chinese-owned overseas subsidiaries buying AI chips
title.zh: 美国封堵中国企业境外子公司购买AI芯片漏洞

summary.en: A report says the U.S. closed a loophole that allowed Chinese-owned subsidiaries outside China to buy AI chips. The practical effect is to make beneficial ownership and end-use harder to route around with offshore entities. That raises compliance costs for distributors and cloud hardware buyers, and it tightens the same AI supply chain already strained by memory and packaging constraints.
summary.zh: 报道称，美国关闭了允许中国企业境外子公司购买AI芯片的漏洞。实际影响是，让受益所有权和最终用途更难通过离岸实体绕开。它会提高分销商和云硬件买家的合规成本，也会进一步收紧本已受存储和封装限制的AI供应链。

title.en: Commerce finalizes CHIPS incentives with Powerex for semiconductor manufacturing components
title.zh: 美国商务部与Powerex敲定CHIPS激励，增强半导体制造关键部件产能

summary.en: The U.S. Department of Commerce finalized CHIPS incentives with Powerex to enhance domestic production capacity for key semiconductor manufacturing components. This is not a headline-grabbing leading-edge fab award, but it targets the component layer that determines whether manufacturing capacity is resilient. The announcement fits the broader policy shift from funding fabs alone to hardening the supply chain around them.
summary.zh: 美国商务部与Powerex敲定CHIPS激励，以增强美国国内关键半导体制造部件产能。这不是最吸睛的先进晶圆厂补贴，但它瞄准的是决定制造能力是否具备韧性的部件层。该公告符合更大政策转向：不只补贴晶圆厂，也要强化其周边供应链。

title.en: Microchip receives US export license for advanced FPGA R&D in Armenia
title.zh: Microchip获得美国出口许可，在亚美尼亚推进先进FPGA研发

summary.en: Microchip received a U.S. export license tied to advanced FPGA R&D in Armenia. The story shows the other side of export controls: licenses can still enable controlled engineering activity when regulators accept the end-use and jurisdictional structure. For FPGA suppliers, compliance becomes part of product-roadmap execution, not only a legal back-office function.
summary.zh: Microchip获得与亚美尼亚先进FPGA研发相关的美国出口许可。这条新闻展示了出口管制的另一面：当监管方接受最终用途和司法辖区结构时，许可证仍可支持受控工程活动。对FPGA供应商而言，合规已成为产品路线图执行的一部分，而不只是法务后台工作。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC taps Nvidia accelerated computing for next-generation semiconductor fabs
title.zh: TSMC采用Nvidia加速计算推进下一代半导体工厂

summary.en: A Reuters-linked report says TSMC is using Nvidia accelerated computing to drive next-generation semiconductor fabs. The significance is architectural: AI is not only the demand driver for chips, it is becoming part of the manufacturing stack that designs, simulates and operates fabs. As process complexity rises, compute infrastructure inside EDA and fab workflows becomes a competitive lever.
summary.zh: 一条Reuters相关报道称，TSMC正采用Nvidia加速计算推进下一代半导体工厂。其意义在架构层面：AI不只是芯片需求来源，也正在进入设计、仿真和运营晶圆厂的制造技术栈。随着制程复杂度上升，EDA和fab流程中的计算基础设施会成为竞争杠杆。

title.en: Alchip taps AWS for semiconductor design and simulation workloads
title.zh: Alchip采用AWS承载半导体设计与仿真工作负载

summary.en: Data Center Dynamics reports that Alchip is tapping AWS for semiconductor design and simulation workloads. Cloud EDA is moving from convenience to capacity planning as AI chips grow larger and verification demand rises. For ASIC design-service firms, access to elastic compute can become a schedule advantage, especially when customers are racing to secure AI silicon windows.
summary.zh: Data Center Dynamics报道称，Alchip正在采用AWS承载半导体设计与仿真工作负载。随着AI芯片规模扩大、验证需求上升，云端EDA正从便利工具变成产能规划的一部分。对ASIC设计服务公司而言，弹性计算能力可能成为进度优势，尤其是在客户争夺AI芯片窗口期时。

stories.source: Data Center Dynamics via Google News

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Intel teams with Foxconn to build rack-scale AI infrastructure
title.zh: Intel与Foxconn合作建设机架级AI基础设施

summary.en: Intel and Foxconn are teaming on rack-scale AI infrastructure. The partnership points to the same shift seen across Computex: AI hardware is increasingly sold as a rack and systems problem rather than a standalone chip SKU. Intel needs partners that can turn silicon, boards, power, cooling and deployment logistics into a credible alternative to Nvidia-led infrastructure.
summary.zh: Intel与Foxconn正合作建设机架级AI基础设施。这项合作指向Computex上反复出现的同一趋势：AI硬件越来越被作为机架和系统问题销售，而不是单颗芯片SKU。Intel需要能把硅、板卡、供电、散热和部署物流组合成可信替代方案的伙伴。

title.en: Netrasemi brings up A2000 AI chip and begins customer evaluation
title.zh: Netrasemi点亮A2000 AI芯片并进入客户评估阶段

summary.en: EE Times reports that Indian startup Netrasemi brought up its A2000 AI chip, built on a 12-nm node, and began customer evaluation. This is early-stage silicon rather than a volume platform, but it is meaningful for India's ambition to move beyond services and packaging into local AI-chip products. Customer evaluation is the first real test of whether the chip has a software and workload story, not just a tapeout milestone.
summary.zh: EE Times报道称，印度初创公司Netrasemi点亮基于12nm节点的A2000 AI芯片，并开始客户评估。这还是早期硅片，而不是量产平台，但对印度从服务和封装走向本土AI芯片产品的目标有意义。客户评估才是真正检验芯片是否有软件和工作负载故事的第一关，而不只是流片里程碑。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者

title.en: SambaNova challenges GPU dominance in AI inference at Computex
title.zh: SambaNova在Computex挑战GPU推理主导地位

summary.en: DigiTimes reports that SambaNova used Computex to challenge GPU dominance in AI inference. The opening is real because inference economics are increasingly shaped by memory movement, batching, latency and software specialization, not only peak FLOPS. The hard part for challengers remains conversion: they must prove total-cost and deployment advantages inside real customer stacks.
summary.zh: DigiTimes报道称，SambaNova在Computex上挑战GPU在AI推理中的主导地位。这个切入口是真实的，因为推理经济性越来越受内存搬运、批处理、延迟和软件专用化影响，而不只是峰值FLOPS。挑战者最难的部分仍是转化：它们必须在真实客户技术栈中证明总成本和部署优势。

title.en: Korea finalizes 800 billion won budget for on-device AI-chip program
title.zh: 韩国敲定8000亿韩元端侧AI芯片项目预算

summary.en: The Elec reports that Korea finalized an 800 billion won budget for an on-device AI-chip program. That places edge AI silicon inside a national industrial plan rather than leaving it only to datacenter-scale GPU competition. The program will matter if it produces deployable chips and software for phones, autos, robotics and public-sector devices, not just research prototypes.
summary.zh: The Elec报道称，韩国敲定8000亿韩元预算用于端侧AI芯片项目。这把边缘AI芯片纳入国家产业计划，而不是只押注数据中心级GPU竞争。该项目的关键在于能否为手机、汽车、机器人和公共部门设备产出可部署芯片与软件，而不只是研究样机。

theme.en: Inference Systems Meet New Memory Devices
theme.zh: 推理系统遇上新型存储器件

dek.en: With arXiv rate-limited today, the research queue leans on Semantic Scholar. The useful through-line is still strong: LLM serving is fighting KV-cache and scheduling overheads while device papers push FeFET, ReRAM, 2T0C DRAM and measured accelerator silicon.
dek.zh: 今天arXiv被限流，研究队列主要来自Semantic Scholar。主线仍然清楚：LLM服务正在处理KV缓存和调度开销，而器件论文则推进FeFET、ReRAM、2T0C DRAM和实测加速器硅片。

title.en: LLM Inference Systems
title.zh: 大模型推理系统

title.en: SparDA: Sparse Decoupled Attention for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
title.zh: SparDA：面向长上下文LLM推理的稀疏解耦注意力

papers.authors: Yaosheng Fu, Guangxuan Xiao, Xin Dong, Song Han, Oreste Villa

summary.en: SparDA adds a forecast projection to predict which KV blocks the next layer will need, allowing sparse-attention offload to overlap CPU-to-GPU prefetch with current-layer execution. The reported gains, including up to 1.7x decode speedup over a sparse-attention offload baseline, are directly relevant to the long-context memory wall. The caveat is that the method assumes model changes and training of the forecast projection, so deployment friction depends on how easily serving teams can adopt modified checkpoints.
summary.zh: SparDA增加forecast投影来预测下一层需要哪些KV块，使稀疏注意力卸载能把CPU到GPU的预取与当前层执行重叠。论文报告相对稀疏注意力卸载基线最高1.7倍decode加速，直接对应长上下文内存墙。局限是该方法需要模型结构改动并训练forecast投影，因此部署摩擦取决于服务团队能否接受修改后的checkpoint。

title.en: FlexNPU: Transparent NPU Virtualization for Dynamic LLM Prefill-Decode Co-location
title.zh: FlexNPU：用于LLM prefill-decode动态共置的透明NPU虚拟化

papers.authors: Jiongjiong Gu, Jianfeng Wang, Zidong Han, Yongqiao Wang, Pengfei Xia, Mingjie Zhang, Hong Liu, Yuanyi Xia, Jiajia Chu, Yifeng Tang, Hui Zang, Xin Yao

summary.en: FlexNPU inserts a user-space virtualization layer around Ascend NPUs to schedule LLM prefill and decode phases without modifying model code, frameworks or drivers. That matters because prefill is compute-heavy while decode is memory/KV-cache-heavy, and static disaggregation can waste resources. The work is a useful reminder that accelerator utilization is now a runtime systems problem as much as a chip architecture problem.
summary.zh: FlexNPU在Ascend NPU周围加入用户态虚拟化层，在不修改模型代码、框架或驱动的前提下调度LLM prefill和decode阶段。这很重要，因为prefill偏计算密集，而decode偏内存和KV缓存密集，静态拆分容易造成资源浪费。该工作提醒我们，加速器利用率现在既是芯片架构问题，也是运行时系统问题。

title.en: NetKV: Network-Aware Decode Instance Selection for Disaggregated LLM Inference
title.zh: NetKV：面向解耦LLM推理的网络感知decode实例选择

summary.en: NetKV treats network transfer of KV cache as part of the time-to-first-token budget in disaggregated LLM serving. The scheduler uses a network cost oracle and reports up to 21.2% lower mean TTFT in a 64-GPU fat-tree simulation. The paper is important because disaggregation only helps if the datacenter network does not become the new hidden memory bus.
summary.zh: NetKV把解耦LLM服务中KV缓存跨网络传输纳入首token延迟预算。其调度器使用网络成本oracle，并在64-GPU fat-tree仿真中报告平均TTFT最高降低21.2%。这篇论文重要，因为解耦架构只有在数据中心网络不变成新的隐藏内存总线时才真正有收益。

title.en: DayPQ: Dynamic Layerwise Pruning and Quantization for LLM Inference Acceleration
title.zh: DayPQ：用于LLM推理加速的动态逐层剪枝与量化

papers.authors: Yongchao Xu, Mingxuan Li, Ziying Zhuo, Qinzhe Zhi, Tianyu Jia, Meiqi Wang

summary.en: DayPQ co-designs adaptive pruning and FP8-style quantization with a multiplication-free shift-add PE array and switchable dataflow. The point is not just compression; it is dynamic compression with low hardware overhead and negligible extra latency. This is the kind of algorithm-hardware coupling likely to matter as LLM inference moves onto more constrained accelerators.
summary.zh: DayPQ把自适应剪枝和类似FP8的量化，与无乘法shift-add PE阵列和可切换数据流协同设计。重点不只是压缩，而是在低硬件开销和几乎无额外延迟下做动态压缩。随着LLM推理进入更多受限加速器，这类算法-硬件耦合会变得重要。

title.en: Measured Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: 实测加速器与存算一体

title.en: A 40-nm Sub-mJ/Transfer HDC-SNN Hybrid Processor for On-Chip Few-Shot Transfer Learning
title.zh: 40nm亚毫焦HDC-SNN混合处理器，用于片上少样本迁移学习

papers.authors: Anqin Xiao, Jinqiao Yang, Wanlin Yang, Xin Zhang, Yuhan He, Ziyi Yang, Lirong Zheng, Zhuo Zou
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Artificial Intelligence

summary.en: This paper reports a fabricated 40-nm hybrid processor combining hyperdimensional computing and spiking neural networks for on-chip few-shot transfer learning. The measured-silicon angle makes it stronger than a pure architecture proposal, and the sub-mJ/transfer claim points at small IoT workloads where retraining in the cloud is unattractive. The question is how broadly the HDC-SNN representation transfers beyond the evaluated neuromorphic datasets.
summary.zh: 这篇论文报道了一颗40nm实测混合处理器，结合超维计算和脉冲神经网络，用于片上少样本迁移学习。实测硅片让它比纯架构方案更有分量，亚毫焦级迁移能耗也指向不适合云端重训练的小型IoT工作负载。后续问题是HDC-SNN表示能否扩展到评估数据集之外的更多任务。

title.en: A 16-nm FinFET CNN Processor for Small-Object Detection on High-Resolution Video
title.zh: 16nm FinFET CNN处理器，用于高分辨率视频小目标检测

papers.authors: Yu-Chun Ding, Chia-Yu Chang, Hui-Yun Tsai, Chun-Yeh Lin, Hao-Jiun Tu, Yu-Ching Su, Kai-Feng Chang, Tsung-Han Hsieh, Wen-Ching Chen, Nian-Shyang Chang, Chun-Pin Lin, Chi-Shi Chen

summary.en: This JSSC paper presents a 16-nm FinFET processor optimized for high-resolution small-object detection, with BiFPN-aware dataflow and memory scheduling. The relevance is practical: ADAS and robotics need high-resolution perception, but off-chip memory traffic can dominate energy and latency. The design's value is in tailoring the processor to the feature-pyramid workload instead of treating vision inference as generic convolution.
summary.zh: 这篇JSSC论文提出一颗16nm FinFET处理器，针对高分辨率小目标检测优化，并包含面向BiFPN的数据流和存储调度。其实用性很强：ADAS和机器人需要高分辨率感知，但片外存储访问会主导能耗和延迟。该设计的价值在于针对特征金字塔工作负载定制处理器，而不是把视觉推理当作通用卷积。

title.en: NeRF-Learner: A 22-nm NeRF-SLAM Accelerator With Unified Inference and Training Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: NeRF-Learner：22nm NeRF-SLAM加速器，统一推理与训练存算一体

papers.authors: Yiqi Jing, Jiaqi Zhou, Yiyang Sun, Meng Wu, Yufei Ma, Tianyu Jia, Le Ye

summary.en: NeRF-Learner reports a 22-nm accelerator for simultaneous neural rendering and SLAM, using unified inference/training compute-in-memory and memory-aware ray scheduling. The measured numbers, including 42.6 FPS rendering and 11.47 TFLOPS/W at BF16 precision, make it a serious edge-robotics silicon result. It also shows how training-in-the-loop workloads are pushing CIM beyond static inference.
summary.zh: NeRF-Learner报道了一颗22nm加速器，用于同步神经渲染和SLAM，并采用统一推理/训练存算一体和存储感知ray调度。42.6 FPS渲染和BF16下11.47 TFLOPS/W等实测数字，让它成为严肃的边缘机器人硅片结果。它也说明，带在线训练的工作负载正在把CIM推过静态推理场景。

title.en: Memory Devices
title.zh: 存储器件

title.en: Multi-Level GAA FeFET by Multi-Ferroelectric/Dielectric Gate Stacks
title.zh: 通过多铁电/介电栅堆栈实现多级GAA FeFET

papers.authors: Wei-Jen Chen, Tao Chou, Ching-Wang Yao, B. Huang, Min-Kuan Lin, Yun-Wen Chen, Yu-Rui Chen, Jhih-Yuan Liang, F. I. C. W. Liu

summary.en: This IEEE EDL paper demonstrates a gate-all-around FeFET with four threshold-voltage levels, a 3 V memory window, 20 ns write time and endurance above 1e8 cycles. The use of multi-ferroelectric/dielectric stacks within a 400 C thermal budget makes it relevant to advanced integration discussions. Multi-level FeFETs remain challenging, but the combination of speed, endurance and GAA geometry is a meaningful device result.
summary.zh: 这篇IEEE EDL论文展示了一种GAA FeFET，实现四级阈值电压、3 V存储窗口、20 ns写入时间和超过1e8次循环耐久。多铁电/介电堆栈并保持400 C热预算，使其与先进集成讨论相关。多级FeFET仍很困难，但速度、耐久和GAA几何结构的组合是有意义的器件结果。

title.en: NanoCiM: Nano-ReRAM Computation-in-Memory With Weight-Aware X-Address Scrambling
title.zh: NanoCiM：采用权重感知X地址扰动的纳米ReRAM存算一体

papers.authors: C. Matsui, Ayumu Yamada, Shota Suzuki, Naoko Misawa, Ken Takeuchi
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Artificial Intelligence

summary.en: NanoCiM attacks IR-drop-induced bit-line current variation in nanoscale ReRAM computation-in-memory arrays by scrambling row addresses based on neural-network weights. That is a very practical circuit problem: analog CIM accuracy often falls apart because interconnect and pattern-dependent current errors are not idealized away in silicon. The paper is useful because it treats mapping and circuit non-idealities as one problem.
summary.zh: NanoCiM通过基于神经网络权重扰动行地址，抑制纳米ReRAM存算一体阵列中由IR drop导致的位线电流变化。这是非常实际的电路问题：模拟CIM精度常常因为互连和数据模式相关电流误差而在硅片上崩掉。该论文的价值在于把映射和电路非理想性作为一个问题处理。

title.en: Unlocking the Performance Limits of 2T0C DRAM With Omega-Gated Single-Crystal In2O3 FETs
title.zh: 用Omega栅单晶In2O3 FET突破2T0C DRAM性能限制

papers.authors: Shiyue Zuo, Z. Xie, Xu Zhao, Lin Tang, Yidan Zhao, Yu Zeng, Wencheng Niu, Sen Liu, Qingjiang Li, Guanhua Yang, Ling Li, Zhipeng Wei

summary.en: This Science Advances paper reports omega-gated single-crystal In2O3 FETs and uses them to build capacitorless 2T0C DRAM. The reported cell metrics include 5 ns access, 1e12-cycle endurance, 1e5 s retention and 3-bit storage, which makes it one of the stronger memory-device entries in today's queue. The caveat is manufacturability: impressive device metrics still need a credible path to array yield and process integration.
summary.zh: 这篇Science Advances论文报道Omega栅单晶In2O3 FET，并用其构建无电容2T0C DRAM。论文给出的单元指标包括5 ns访问、1e12次耐久、1e5 s保持和3-bit存储，是今天研究队列中较强的存储器件结果之一。局限在可制造性：亮眼器件指标仍需要可信的阵列良率和工艺集成路径。
